title: Private Conference Between Mari and WHOM Solved
display_title: Private Conference Between Mari and WHOM Solved
wikitext:
[]: Private Conference Between Mari & WHOM? (Solved)             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 01, 2020 6:24 pm Title may be a bit presumptuous, but it was getting pretty long. This thread inspired me to look at this sequence from the post-Ha preview again: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Private Conference Between Mari & WHOM? (Solved)             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Mar 01, 2020 6:31 pm It might seem like X, Y and Z should also fit in there, but all three have been tested and all three don't fit. So "Yui Ikari" isn't the one being talked to, contrary to what we briefly feared might happen in the making of this

[]: Re: Private Conference Between Mari & WHOM? (Solved)             Quote Post by Joseki » Sun Mar 01, 2020 8:39 pm I honestly assumed for the past few years that there is actually not real text under that, but Tentative does fit.

[]: Re: Private Conference Between Mari & WHOM? (Solved)             Quote Post by Zoop » Mon Mar 02, 2020 4:49 am Does it make sense tho, to write out Mari's full name, and only use the word Tentative for Rei? On it's own, just Tentative doesn't mean all that much, could be referring to something else, even tho afaik this is only used with Rei, just saying, isn't it a bit too ambiguous to only use this word to address someone? Also why be secretive about this (esp since they show flashes of new versions of Rei, not exactly a secret then)? Like Blockio said, if it were to be Yui or something, then that would be a lot more reason to be secretive about it. Absolutely awesome deduction tho, props for the work put in it Reichu

[]: Re: Private Conference Between Mari & WHOM? (Solved)             Quote Post by AlphaZero » Sun Aug 30, 2020 5:44 pm Beautiful work Reichu! This makes me wonder if Mari and Black Rei had their conversation then Rei had her memory wiped maybe in combination with the device allegedly used to implant orders in her brain(I'm referring to that concept art of 13 having needles through its face).
